usage: setSdpGroupAttribute [-help] [-flip {X Y XY NONE}] [-justifyBy {SW SE NW NE MID}] -name <string> [-orient {R0 MX MY R180 NONE}] [-origin {x y}] [-padding {x y}] [-skipSpace <string>]

options.name: -flip
options.description: Specify to flip the sdp group on X or Y axis along with its elements. The alignment information is adjusted accordingly.

options.name: -justifyBy
options.description: Specify the anchor point that will be used to align SDP group.

options.name: -name
options.description: Specify the name of sdp object

options.name: -orient
options.description: Specify the orient of sdp object.

options.name: -origin
options.description: Specify the location of top sdp group. It can only be set to top group.

options.name: -padding
options.description: Specify the edge extend value of SDP bounding box in horizontal and vertical direction for specified top SDP group.

options.name: -skipSpace
options.description: Specify the spacing pattern of SDP group. The value for row skipping represents the number of skipped rows. The value for column skipping represents the number of the default techsite size_x. If the sdp group is skipSpace, will accept a value.
